claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S020_PRE_01 (", and I think guies, for example, are extremely important to this because a g...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T008_S001_BLO_01 ("So I I I still don't understand why this is the wrong starting point altogeth...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S020) and the blocker (snippet S001) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
